attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
		 NCR.DRVD_NCR_BKG_TRX_KEY
		,NCR.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
		,NCR.SALES_ORDER_KEY
,CASE WHEN NCR.SALES_REP_NUMBER ='UNKNOWN' THEN SCA.NEW_SALES_REP_NUMBER ELSE NCR.SALES_REP_NUMBER END AS SALES_REP_NUMBER		,NCR.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
		,NCR.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
		,NCR.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
		,NCR.PRODUCT_KEY
			,CASE WHEN NCR.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY =-999 THEN SCA.NEW_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY ELSE NCR.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY END AS SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
		,CASE WHEN NCR.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE ='UNKNOWN' THEN SCA.NEW_BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE ELSE NCR.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE END AS SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE
		,NCR.SALES_CREDIT_ASGN_KEY
		,NCR.SO_SOURCE_COMMIT_DT
		,NCR.SOL_SOURCE_COMMIT_DT
		,NCR.SCA_SOURCE_COMMIT_DT
FROM  $$NRTNCRVWDB.MT_DRVD_NCR_BKG_TRX NCR
INNER JOIN $$NRTSTGDB.WI_SCA_RETRO_NRT_3 SCA
ON( NCR.SALES_CREDIT_ASGN_KEY = SCA.SALES_CREDIT_ASSIGNMENT_KEY   
AND SCA.SCA_SOURCE_COMMIT_DATE=NCR.SCA_SOURCE_COMMIT_DT)
WHERE (NCR.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY =-999 OR NCR.SALES_REP_NUMBER='UNKNOWN' OR NCR.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE ='UNKNOWN' )

SELECT 
		 NCR.DRVD_NCR_BKG_TRX_KEY
		/*,NCR.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY*/
		,NCR.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY /*Q3FY14 OA*/
		,NCR.SALES_ORDER_KEY
		,NCR.SALES_REP_NUMBER
		,NCR.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
		,NCR.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
		,CASE WHEN  NCR.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY =-999 THEN SOL.NEW_SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY ELSE  NCR.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY  END AS  SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
		,CASE WHEN  NCR.PRODUCT_KEY =-999 THEN SOL.NEW_PRODUCT_KEY ELSE  NCR.PRODUCT_KEY  END AS  PRODUCT_KEY
		,NCR.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
		,NCR.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE
		,NCR.SALES_CREDIT_ASGN_KEY
		,NCR.SO_SOURCE_COMMIT_DT
		,NCR.SOL_SOURCE_COMMIT_DT
		,NCR.SCA_SOURCE_COMMIT_DT
FROM  $$NRTNCRVWDB.MT_DRVD_NCR_BKG_TRX NCR
INNER JOIN $$NRTSTGDB.WI_SOL_NRT_RETRO_3 SOL
ON( NCR.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = SOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY /*Q3FY14 OA*/
AND SOL.SOURCE_COMMIT_DATE=NCR.SOL_SOURCE_COMMIT_DT)
WHERE  ( NCR.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY =-999  OR  NCR.PRODUCT_KEY =-999)
attributes.Pre SQL:
DELETE FROM $$NRTSTGDB.WI_NCR_BKG_TRX_RETRO ALL;

UPDATE  A
FROM    
$$NRTNCRVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_NRT_HIST_TV  A,
$$NRTSTGDB.WI_SO_NRT_RETRO_2 B
SET 
SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY=B.NEW_SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ACCT_KEY,
BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY=B.NEW_BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
WHERE 
A.SALES_ORDER_KEY =B.SALES_ORDER_KEY
AND 
A.SOURCE_COMMIT_DTM =B.SOURCE_COMMIT_DTM;

UPDATE  A
FROM    
$$NRTNCRVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_NRT_HIST_TV  A,
$$NRTSTGDB.WI_SOL_NRT_RETRO_2 B
SET 
PRODUCT_KEY=B.NEW_PRODUCT_KEY,
SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY=B.NEW_SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
WHERE 
A.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY =B.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
AND 
A.SOURCE_COMMIT_DTM =B.SOURCE_COMMIT_DTM;


UPDATE  A
FROM    
$$NRTNCRVWDB.N_SCA_FOR_ALL_TRX_NRT_HIST_TV A,
$$NRTSTGDB.WI_SCA_RETRO_NRT_2 B
SET 
SALES_REP_NUMBER=B.NEW_SALES_REP_NUMBER,
SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=B.NEW_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE = B.NEW_BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE
WHERE 
A.SALES_CREDIT_ASSIGNMENT_KEY =B.SALES_CREDIT_ASSIGNMENT_KEY
AND 
A.SCA_SOURCE_COMMIT_DTM =B.SCA_SOURCE_COMMIT_DTM
AND
B.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD = 'O';

UPDATE  A
FROM    
$$NRTNCRVWDB.N_SCA_FOR_ALL_TRX_NRT_HIST_TV A,
$$NRTSTGDB.WI_SCA_RETRO_NRT_2 B
SET 
RU_AR_TRANSACTION_LINE_KEY = B.NEW_RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
SALES_REP_NUMBER=B.NEW_SALES_REP_NUMBER,
SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=B.NEW_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE = B.NEW_BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE
WHERE 
A.SALES_CREDIT_ASSIGNMENT_KEY =B.SALES_CREDIT_ASSIGNMENT_KEY
AND 
A.SCA_SOURCE_COMMIT_DTM =B.SCA_SOURCE_COMMIT_DTM
AND
B.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD <> 'O';


UPDATE  A
FROM    
$$NRTNCRVWDB.N_SCA_FOR_ALL_TRX_NRT_HIST_TV A,
$$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE B
SET 
RU_AR_TRANSACTION_LINE_KEY = B.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
WHERE 
A.EP_SOURCE_LINE_ID_INT   = B.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
AND A.SS_CD=B.SS_CODE
AND A.RU_AR_TRANSACTION_LINE_KEY  =-7777
AND A.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD <> 'O';

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
		 NCR.DRVD_NCR_BKG_TRX_KEY
		,NCR.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
		,NCR.SALES_ORDER_KEY
		,NCR.SALES_REP_NUMBER
	,CASE WHEN  NCR.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY =-999 THEN SO.NEW_SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ACCT_KEY ELSE  NCR.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY  END AS  SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
		,CASE WHEN  NCR.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY =-999 THEN SO.NEW_BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY ELSE  NCR.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY  END AS  BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
		,NCR.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
		,NCR.PRODUCT_KEY
		,NCR.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
		,NCR.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE
		,NCR.SALES_CREDIT_ASGN_KEY
		,NCR.SO_SOURCE_COMMIT_DT           
		,NCR.SOL_SOURCE_COMMIT_DT
		,NCR.SCA_SOURCE_COMMIT_DT
FROM  $$NRTNCRVWDB.MT_DRVD_NCR_BKG_TRX NCR
INNER JOIN $$NRTSTGDB.WI_SO_NRT_RETRO_3 SO
ON( NCR.SALES_ORDER_KEY = SO.SALES_ORDER_KEY
AND SO.SOURCE_COMMIT_DATE=NCR.SO_SOURCE_COMMIT_DT)
WHERE  (NCR.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY =-999  OR NCR.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY =-999)
